name: Cass Park
description: Cass Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Ithaca, NY. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Reservations are not available. Players have access to restrooms and water.

name: Cornell Faculty Tennis Club
description: Cornell Faculty Tennis Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Ithaca, NY. The court surface is concrete. Amenities include restrooms. A membership is required to play.

name: Dryden High School
description: Come play pickleball at Dryden High School in Dryden, NY! There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. You can’t reserve the courts. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Kendal At Ithaca Community
description: Kendal At Ithaca Community is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Ithaca, NY. There is 1 indoor court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Amenities include restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. A membership is required to play.

name: Montgomery Park
description: Montgomery Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Dryden, NY. There is 1 outdoor hard court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The court is free. You can’t reserve the court.

name: Pickleball Mania
description: Pickleball Mania is a place to play pickleball in Ithaca, NY. There are 4 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, lights, and water. A one-time fee is required to play. You can reserve the courts.

name: Reis Tennis Center
description: Reis Tennis Center is a place to play pickleball in Ithaca, NY. There are 12 hard courts. 6 are outdoors and 6 are indoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Reservations are available. Amenities include restrooms. A membership is required to play.

name: TC3
description: TC3 is a place to play pickleball in Dryden, NY. There are 3 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. You can’t reserve the courts.

name: YMCA of Ithaca and Tompkins County
description: YMCA of Ithaca and Tompkins County is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Ithaca, NY. There are 4 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts cannot be reserved. Players have access to restrooms, water, wheelchair accessibility, lights, and locker rooms. A one-time fee is required to play.
